parameters.jsCode:
const QUERY_POOL = [
  'site:.de "GmbH" "Impressum" "Versandkosten" -"coming soon"',
  'site:.de "GmbH" "Impressum" "Warenkorb" -"coming soon"',
  'site:.de "GmbH" "Widerrufsbelehrung" "Versandkosten"',
  'site:.de "UG" "Impressum" "Warenkorb"',
  'site:.de "UG" "Widerrufsbelehrung" "Versandkosten"',
  'site:.de "e.K." "Impressum" "Versandkosten"',
  'site:.de "Inhaber" "AGB" "Shopify"',
  'site:.de "GmbH" "Impressum" "Versandkosten" Mode',
  'site:.de "GmbH" "Impressum" "Versandkosten" Beauty',
  'site:.de "GmbH" "Impressum" "Versandkosten" Sport',
  'site:.de "GmbH" "Impressum" "Versandkosten" Wohnen',
  'site:.de "GmbH" "Impressum" "Versandkosten" Elektronik',
  'site:.de "GmbH" "Impressum" "Versandkosten" Kosmetik',
  'site:.de "GmbH" "Impressum" "Versandkosten" Schmuck',
  'site:.de "GmbH" "Impressum" "Versandkosten" Haustier',
  'site:.de "GmbH" "Impressum" "Versandkosten" Gesundheit',
  'site:.de "GmbH" "Impressum" "Versandkosten" Outdoor',
  'site:.de "Impressum" "GmbH" "Barrierefreiheit" "Versandkosten"',
  'site:.de "GmbH" "Barrierefreiheitserklarung" "Versandkosten"',
  'site:.de "Barrierefreiheit" "GmbH" "Warenkorb"',
  'site:.de "Datenschutz" "Widerrufsbelehrung" "GmbH"'
];

const shuffled = QUERY_POOL.slice().sort(function() { return 0.5 - Math.random(); });
return shuffled.slice(0, 5).map(function(query, idx) { return { json: { query: query, idx: idx } }; });
